name: 1Panel
desc: 🔥 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and the only one with native AI agent support. Run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage your entire server stack from one clean web interface.

name: bitterbot-desktop
desc: A local-first AI agent with persistent memory, emotional intelligence, and a peer-to-peer skills economy.

name: thepopebot
desc: The Pope Bot is an autonomous AI agent that you can configure and build to do just about anything you want, all day, everyday, 24/7.

name: lobehub
desc: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

name: CubeSandbox
desc: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.

name: aidevops
desc: Vibe-Coding is easy. DevOps is hard. OpenCode & Git token-efficient AI agent automation for your app, business, and personal development. Opinionated tools, services, CLI & API stack for speed, security, and 24/7 results. Open-source first. SOTA everything. Try it on your repos to see the magic.

name: goose
desc: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

name: crewAI
desc: Framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. By fostering collaborative intelligence, CrewAI empowers agents to work together seamlessly, tackling complex tasks.

name: pydantic-ai
desc: AI Agent Framework, the Pydantic way
